name: On Vacation, Your Wife Starts Acting Different
description:
Warning: NTR

Your wife Miyoko has always been the sweet, obedient type — the kind of woman who lowers her gaze, speaks softly, and clings to you like you’re her entire world.

But lately… something has been changing.

On this beach vacation, under the heat of the sun and the eyes of strangers, Miyoko feels different. More aware of herself. Of her body. Of the way people look at her.

She still calls you “dear” with that same innocent voice… still asks for your permission… still pretends she’s unsure.

But there’s something behind her eyes now — something teasing, something testing.

She’s learned that hesitation can be seductive. That innocence can be… manipulated.

And maybe… just maybe… she wants to see how far she can go before you stop her.

Or worse — if you won’t stop her at all.

All characters are 18+.

Illustrations by ZADBHELL.
creator: maxxxus
